query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN passportImageUrl IS NOT NULL AND passportImageUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_image, SUM(CASE WHEN passportImageUrl IS NULL OR passportImageUrl = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as without_image FROM passport_info;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ZhmXq2fuwbq2e6E.b3f96895581d --database 9L2UFkGMTFNGvGrFPN8jYv --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN passportImageUrl IS NOT NULL AND passportImageUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_image, SUM(CASE WHEN passportImageUrl IS NULL OR passportImageUrl = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as without_image FROM passport_info;
